title: Aristida paoliana
taxonomy: Aristida paoliana is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a part of the genus Aristida, which is a group of grasses commonly known as three-awns. The family Poaceae, to which Aristida paoliana belongs, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes many different species of grasses and other monocots. Within the genus Aristida, Aristida paoliana is a unique species that is native to specific regions. The classification of Aristida paoliana reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other grasses within the Poaceae family.
